sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Q3eSE_RW0_U02_Reading
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Q3eSE_RW0_U02_Reading.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Unusual Schools
sentences.arabic: مدارس غير اعتيادية
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Unusual Schools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Do you like school?
sentences.arabic: هل تعجبك المدرسة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Do you like school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Or do you think school is boring؟
sentences.arabic: أم هل تعتقد أن المدرسة مملة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Or do you think school is boring.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Maybe you want to go to a different kind of school?
sentences.arabic: ربما تريد الذهاب إلى نوع مختلف من المدرسة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Maybe you want to go to a different kind of school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Some schools are very unusual.
sentences.arabic: بعض المدارس غير عادية للغاية.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Some schools are very unusual.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: In Argentina, one school is in a very interesting place.
sentences.arabic: في الأرجنتين، توجد مدرسة في مكان مثير للاهتمام للغاية.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In Argentina, one school is in a very interesting place.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: In Argentina
sentences.arabic: في الأرجنتين
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In Argentina.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: one school is in a very interesting place.
sentences.arabic: يوجد مدرسة في مكان مثير جدًا للاهتمام..
sentences.audio: assets/audio/one school is in a very interesting place.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: More than 2,000 children attend the River Plate Academy in Buenos Aires.
sentences.arabic: أكثر من 2,000 طفل يحضرون أكاديمية ريفر بليت في بوينس آيرس.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/More than 2,000 children attend the River Plate Academy in Buenos Aires.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Why is this school different?
sentences.arabic: لماذا هذه المدرسة مختلفة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Why is this school different.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is inside a large soccer stadium.
sentences.arabic: إنها داخل استاد كرة قدم كبير.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is inside a large soccer stadium.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Sometimes the national soccer team of Argentina plays in this stadiumز
sentences.arabic: أحيانًا يلعب المنتخب الوطني لكرة القدم في الأرجنتين في هذا الاستاد.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Sometimes the national soccer team of Argentina plays in this stadium.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: More than 70,000 people can watch a game here
sentences.arabic: أكثر من 70,000 شخص يمكنهم مشاهدة مباراة هنا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/More than 70,000 people can watch a game here.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Famous singers and bands play concerts in the stadium
sentences.arabic: يُحيي المطربون والفرق الموسيقية الشهيرة حفلات في الاستاد.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Famous singers and bands play concerts in the stadium.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Many of the students want to become soccer players.
sentences.arabic: كثير من الطلاب يريدون أن يصبحوا لاعبي كرة قدم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Many of the students want to become soccer players.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The country of Bangladesh is near India.
sentences.arabic: دولة بنغلاديش قريبة من الهند.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The country of Bangladesh is near India.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It rains a lot every year.
sentences.arabic: تمطر كثيرًا كل سنة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It rains a lot every year.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: This causes floods.
sentences.arabic: هذا يسبب الفيضانات.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/This causes floods.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is difficult for people to travel because of all the water.
sentences.arabic: من الصعب على الناس السفر بسبب كل المياه.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is difficult for people to travel because of all the water.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: As a result, in some places, there are special schools.
sentences.arabic: نتيجة لذلك، في بعض الأماكن، هناك مدارس خاصة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/As a result, in some places, there are special schools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: As a result
sentences.arabic: نتيجة لذلك
sentences.audio: assets/audio/As a result.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: in some places
sentences.arabic: في بعض الأماكن
sentences.audio: assets/audio/in some places.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: there are special schools
sentences.arabic: هناك مدارس خاصة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/there are special schools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: These schools are on boats.
sentences.arabic: هذه المدارس على القوارب
sentences.audio: assets/audio/These schools are on boats.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The boats pick up students from their small towns.
sentences.arabic: تلتقط القوارب الطلاب من بلداتهم الصغيرة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The boats pick up students from their small towns.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Then the students have class on the boat on the water.
sentences.arabic: ثم يحضر الطلاب الدرس على القارب في المياه.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Then the students have class on the boat on the water.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students sit on wooden benches.
sentences.arabic: يجلس الطلاب على مقاعد خشبية.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students sit on wooden benches.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The teacher uses a blackboard
sentences.arabic: المعلم يستخدم السبورة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The teacher uses a blackboard.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students could not go to school without the boats.
sentences.arabic: لم يستطع الطلاب الذهاب إلى المدرسة بدون القوارب.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students could not go to school without the boats.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Do you like to be outside?
sentences.arabic: هل تعجبك أن تكون في الخارج؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Do you like to be outside.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Maybe you would like the Mountain School.
sentences.arabic: ربما ستُعجبك مدرسة الجبل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Maybe you would like the Mountain School.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: This school is in the state of Vermont in the United States.
sentences.arabic: هذه المدرسة تقع في ولاية فيرمونت في الولايات المتحدة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/This school is in the state of Vermont in the United States.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Students at this school are 16 or 17 years old.
sentences.arabic: الطلاب في هذه المدرسة أعمارهم 16 أو 17 سنة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Students at this school are 16 or 17 years old.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They attend the Mountain School for just one term.
sentences.arabic: هم يحضرون مدرسة الجبل لفصل دراسي واحد فقط.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They attend the Mountain School for just one term.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students come from different parts of the United States.
sentences.arabic: يأتي الطلاب من أجزاء مختلفة من الولايات المتحدة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students come from different parts of the United States.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They live at the school.
sentences.arabic: هم يعيشون في المدرسة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They live at the school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They work on the school’s farm to help grow food.
sentences.arabic: يعملون في مزرعة المدرسة للمساعدة في زراعة الطعام.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They work on the school’s farm to help grow food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They feed the farm animals.
sentences.arabic: هم يطعمون حيوانات المزرعة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They feed the farm animals.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Students also help clean the school.
sentences.arabic: الطلاب يساعدون أيضًا في تنظيف المدرسة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Students also help clean the school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They visit the nearby forests, fields, and rivers.
sentences.arabic: هم يزورون الغابات والحقول والأنهار القريبة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They visit the nearby forests, fields, and rivers.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: On weekends, students play sports and games together.
sentences.arabic: في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع، يلعب الطلاب الرياضة والألعاب معًا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/On weekends, students play sports and games together.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Or, like many students, they sleep late.
sentences.arabic: أو، مثل الكثير من الطلاب، ينامون متأخرين.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Or, like many students, they sleep late.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Are there too many rules at your school
sentences.arabic: هل هناك الكثير من القوانين في مدرستك؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Are there too many rules at your school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: You should try the Brooklyn Free School in New York.
sentences.arabic: يستحسن أن تجرب مدرسة بروكلين الحرة في نيويورك.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/You should try the Brooklyn Free School in New York.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Students can choose any class they want.
sentences.arabic: يمكن للطلاب اختيار أي صف يريدونه.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Students can choose any class they want.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Students help make important decisions at this school.
sentences.arabic: الطلاب يساعدون في اتخاذ قرارات مهمة في هذه المدرسة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Students help make important decisions at this school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students help make the school rules.
sentences.arabic: يساعد الطلاب في وضع قوانين المدرسة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students help make the school rules.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Some students study independently.
sentences.arabic: بعض الطلاب يدرسون بشكل مستقل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Some students study independently.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Others decide to play or draw pictures.
sentences.arabic: يقرر آخرون أن يلعبوا أو يرسموا صورا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Others decide to play or draw pictures.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: There are no tests, homework, or grades.
sentences.arabic: لا توجد اختبارات أو واجبات منزلية أو درجات.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/There are no tests, homework, or grades.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Is there anything unusual about your school?
sentences.arabic: هل هناك شيء غير عادي في مدرستك؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Is there anything unusual about your school.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Why is it special?
sentences.arabic: لماذا هو مميز؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Why is it special.mp3
